# industry_other corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Industry / automotive ===
# expect: Vehicle Identification Number (VIN)
# expect: Tesla Owner API Legacy Token
VIN: 1HGCM82633A004352
https://owner-api.teslamotors.com/oauth/token aaaaaaaa1111bbbb2222cccc3333dddd4444eeee5555ffff6666aaaa7777bbbb

# === Industry / retail e-commerce ===
# expect: WooCommerce Consumer Key
# expect: WooCommerce Consumer Secret
# expect: BigCommerce X-Auth-Token
# expect: Klaviyo Private API Key
# expect: Algolia Admin API Key
ck_8d8b5e0ee1d65081f1270736db585dc62d3a3e88
cs_c483bc1b79a0e81c15763cc990bdf8f2cb7f0020
X-Auth-Token: abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456
pk_abc123def456ghi789jkl0mno123pqrst4
X-Algolia-API-Key: 0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Industry / travel and GDS ===
# expect: Sabre OAuth2 Access Token
# expect: Travelport Universal API Credential
# expect: Airline PNR Record Locator
# expect: ICAO 24-bit Aircraft Address
T1RKLAAaJxQTKLqJYKabcdef0123456789
Universal API/uAPI1234567-12345
PNR: XYZ7AB
ICAO24: A12B3C

# === Industry / aerospace and logistics identifiers ===
# expect: ISO 6346 Container Number
# EasyPost moved to the payments bucket (deduped); names follow payments.
# expect: EasyPost API Token
# expect: EasyPost Test API Token
# expect: Shippo Live API Token
# expect: Shippo Test API Token
# expect: USPS Web Tools UserID
CSQU3054383
EZAKabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQR
EZTKabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQR
shippo_live_0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567
shippo_test_0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567
123ABCDE4567

# === Industry / shipping carrier API keys ===
# expect: FedEx OAuth Client ID
# expect: DHL MyDHL REST API Key
https://apis.fedex.com/oauth l7e6abcd1234ef567890123456789012
https://api-eu.dhl.com/track aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789abcd

# === Industry / energy and education ===
# expect: Octopus Energy API Key
# expect: Enphase Enlighten API Key
# expect: Canvas LMS Access Token
sk_live_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ012345
https://api.enphaseenergy.com/api/v4/systems?key=aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ012345
1234~aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789abcdef

# === Industry / vehicle, maritime, mail (Block 8a, checksum-gated) ===
# All synthetic but check-digit valid.
# expect: Vehicle Identification Number (NA check digit)
1M8GDM9AXKP042788
# expect: IMO Ship Number
IMO 9074729
# expect: USPS S10 Tracking
RB123456785US
# expect: UPS Tracking Number
1Z999AA10123456784
# expect: Amazon Order ID
123-1234567-1234567
